description: Create a professional conference schedule in LibreOffice Writer using the raw data provided in /home/ga/Documents/schedule_data.txt. Format the document in landscape orientation with 0.5-inch margins on all sides. Organize the schedule into a table with four columns: Time, Main Stage, Track A, and Track B. For events marked '(ALL ATTENDEES)', merge the three venue columns. The table must include a header row that repeats across pages. Apply a 'Light Blue' background color to Keynote rows and a 'Light Gray' background to Lunch/Break rows, with all cell text centered vertically. Save the completed schedule as /home/ga/Documents/conference_schedule.docx.
